profile.name: Piotr Kroczak
profile.headline: AI & Data Science | Agentic Workflow Design | Data Automation
profile.summary: Piotr combines a marketing and growth background with data science, statistics, and AI automation to deliver practical, measurable outcomes.

professionalBackground: Built a multi-year career in digital marketing, SEO strategy, and content operations across travel, media, and technology contexts.
Transitioned toward data science and AI to move from intuition-based decisions to evidence-driven analysis and decision support.
Works at the intersection of business context and technical execution, translating complex topics into practical action.
mainTechnicalSkills: Python for data analysis and workflow automation
Statistics, hypothesis-driven analysis, and interpretation of outcomes
Machine learning foundations and applied experimentation
SEO analytics and NLP-oriented content evaluation
Agentic workflow design and AI-assisted process automation
Dashboard-oriented performance monitoring and KPI analysis

projects.name: AI-Assisted Operations Workflows
projects.description: Designing tools for technical support and recruitment workflows to improve information retrieval and evaluation quality.

projects.name: Multilingual Data Automation Pipeline
projects.description: Building internal systems for scraping, processing, and distributing multilingual datasets using automated pipelines.

projects.name: SEO Analytics Agent
projects.description: Developing KPI-driven analytics support for content quality, readability, keyword strategy, and NLP-informed optimization.

projects.name: Dataset Cleaning and Structuring Assistant
projects.description: Creating automation for preprocessing and structuring data before deeper analysis.

howPiotrHelpsCompanies: Connects strategy and execution to improve data-informed decision making.
Designs automation that reduces repetitive work and improves operational consistency.
Applies analytical methods to identify performance drivers and optimization opportunities.
Bridges communication between technical and non-technical stakeholders.
portfolioRoadmap: Consulting impact stories tied to measurable outcomes
